zh.Ollerton, Nottinghamshire, England, Unit: 英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾奧勒頓
zh.Saint John the Baptist Church Cemetery,: 英國英格蘭爾可努恰福德

zh.lifeSummary: 當Randall Baguley於1518年出生在英國爾奧勒頓時，他的父親Ralph de Baguley23歲，母親Cecily Massey16歲。他於大約1538年與Eleanor Grosvenor在英國英格蘭素福爾可結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1556年11月14日在英國英格蘭爾奧勒頓享年38歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭爾可努恰福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Randall Baguley于1518年出生在英国爾奧勒頓时，他的父亲Ralph de Baguley23岁，母亲Cecily Massey16岁。他于大约1538年与Eleanor Grosvenor在英国英格兰素福爾可结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1556年11月14日在英国英格兰爾奧勒頓享年38岁，埋葬在英国英格兰爾可努恰福德。

nameMeanings.name: Baguley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Baguley (Cheshire). The placename is from Old English bagga denoting an unidentified animal, perhaps the badger, + lēah ‘wood, clearing’. Compare Bagley .

variants.name: Bagley
meanings: English: habitational name from Baguley in Cheshire or from any of several places called Bagley, in Devon, Gloucestershire, Shropshire, Somerset, and Yorkshire. These get their names either from the Old English personal name Bacga + Old English lēah ‘woodland clearing’ or from an unattested Old English word, bagga, for a ‘bag-shaped’ object or creature + lēah.

nameMeanings.name: Randall
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Mainly U.S.: medieval vernacular form of   Randolf .  This was in common use as a given name into the 17th century and gave rise to a surname. In modern use the given name is often a transferred use of this surname.

variants.name: Randell
meanings: Mainly U.S.: medieval vernacular form of   Randolf .  This was in common use as a given name into the 17th century and gave rise to a surname. In modern use the given name is often a transferred use of this surname.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: When Randall Baguley was born in 1518, in Ollerton, Cheshire, England, his father, Ralph de Baguley, was 23 and his mother, Cecily Massey, was 16. He married Eleanor Grosvenor about 1538, in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 14 November 1556, in Ollerton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 38, and was buried in Knutsford, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Randall Baguley est né en 1518, à Ollerton, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Ralph de Baguley, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Cecily Massey, avait 16 ans. Il a épousé Eleanor Grosvenor environ 1538, à Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 14 novembre 1556, à Ollerton, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 38 ans, et a été enterré à Knutsford, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Randall Baguley 1518 in Ollerton, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ralph de Baguley 23 und seine Mutter Cecily Massey 16. Er hat um 1538 in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom Eleanor Grosvenor geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 14. November 1556 im Alter von 38 Jahren in Ollerton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Knutsford, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Randall Baguley è nato il nel 1518 nel Ollerton, Cheshire, England, il suo padre, Ralph de Baguley, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Cecily Massey, aveva 16 anni. Lui sposato Eleanor Grosvenor circa 1538, nel Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 14 novembre 1556, nel Ollerton, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 38 anni, e fu sepolto a Knutsford, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Randall Baguleyが1518年にイギリスチェシュアイアオラートンで生まれた時，父Ralph de Baguleyは23歳，母Cecily Masseyは16歳であった。約1538年にイギリスイギリススフォルクでEleanor Grosvenorと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1556年11月14日にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアオラートンで38歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスチェシュアイアヌトスフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Randall Baguley(이)가 1518년 영국 체실르 레르턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ralph de Baguley(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Cecily Massey(은)는 16세였다. 그는 대략 1538년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크에서 Eleanor Grosvenor(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1556년 11월 14일 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 레르턴에서 38세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 누츠퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Randall Baguley nasceu em 1518, em Ollerton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Ralph de Baguley, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Cecily Massey, tinha 16 anos. Ele casou-se com Eleanor Grosvenor aproximadamente 1538, em Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 14 de novembro de 1556, em Ollerton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 38 anos, e foi sepultado em Knutsford, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Randall Baguley родился в 1518 г. в местности оллиртон, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Ralph de Baguley было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Cecily Massey, 16. Он женился на женщине по имени Eleanor Grosvenor около 1538 г. в местности суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 14 ноября 1556 г. в местности оллиртон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 38 лет и был похоронен в местности нуцфорд, чешир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Randall Baguley nació en 1518, en Ollerton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Ralph de Baguley, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Cecily Massey, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Eleanor Grosvenor aproximadamente 1538, en Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 14 de noviembre de 1556, en Ollerton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 38 años, y fue sepultado en Knutsford, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
